bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=china-macro Items: 3 · Forecasts emitted: 4 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-05-24 · [research_task] 评估通缩压力与PBOC利率引导空间

DONE · owner=china-macro

在PPI持续低迷背景下，评估PBOC是否会在三季度进一步下调1年期MLF利率，以及其对债市短端利率的引导空间。

  • Outcome: Evaluated Q3 MLF cut space and short-end CGB yield guidance under commodity PPI push and NIM constraints in PBOC Policy Outlook section of 02_china_macro.md

2026-05-24 · [research_task] Evaluate PBoC next move: quantity vs price tools

DONE · owner=china-macro

Weight the probability of PBoC easing via quantity tools (re-lending, MLF) vs another LPR cut, assuming low CPI and poor property sales as requested in the follow_ups section.

  • Outcome: Weighted quantity vs price tools probability (70% vs 30%) in PBOC Policy Outlook section of 02_china_macro.md

2026-05-24 · [research_task] 评估中美峰会农业订单对国内通胀及资产负债表的影响

DONE · owner=china-macro · research discussion=评估中美峰会农业订单对国内通胀及资产负债表的影响 (led by china-macro)

与 china-macro 协作，评估中美峰会农业订单对国内通胀预期及居民部门资产负债表 (rp_882320308e0444c7) 的间接修复作用。 (来自第4节)
